Premium Cleaning Services for Your Home

Immaculate Spaces,
Zero Effort Required.

Experience luxury cleanliness. Request top-tier cleaning professionals on-demand, and enjoy a pristine environment without lifting a finger.

Book a Cleaning Learn More
4.9/5 Average Rating
Instant Booking
Fully Insured Workers

Premium Standard

Vetted professionals

We elevate your living standards.

At Dirt-X, we understand that your time is your most valuable asset. Our marketplace connects you with elite, meticulously vetted cleaning professionals in your area.

Whether you need a post-event deep clean or regular upkeep for your luxury residence, we eliminate the hassle of finding reliable help. You simply request a service, our nearby experts accept, and your space is transformed into a spotless sanctuary.

  • Rigorous 5-step vetting process for all workers
  • Eco-friendly & premium cleaning supplies used
  • Seamless, cashless payments upon completion
Explore our process

Tailored Cleaning Solutions

Select from our range of specialized services designed to meet the highest standards of cleanliness and luxury.

Signature House Cleaning

Comprehensive top-to-bottom cleaning for your entire residence. Perfect for regular maintenance.

View details

Deep Clean Intensive

An exhaustive service reaching every corner, baseboard, and hidden surface. Ideal for spring cleaning.

View details

Move-In/Move-Out

Ensure your new or old property is immaculate. Detailed cleaning for empty spaces.

View details

Post-Event Cleanup

Enjoy your event without worrying about the aftermath. Fast, discreet, and thorough restoration.

View details

Executive Office

Maintain a pristine professional environment that impresses clients and boosts productivity.

View details

Need something custom?

We can tailor our services to your exact specifications.
